name: Mechanic 8230: Escape from Ilgrot
short_description: Mechanic 8230: Episode 1 is an adventure game in the point-and-click genre. Help the mechanic find his robot friend RO-2 and together unveil the secrets of the world destroyed by the Cataclysm.
detailed_description:
JOIN OUR DISCORD!


About the Game

Estimated Playtime (Episode 1): ~2 hours

Story:

Enter the post-apocalyptic world of Bifrostia, where mutants and robots coexist among the ruins of a lost technological civilization. The story takes place in Ilgrot — a rust-covered city governed by an artificial intelligence, where strange events unfold.

One seemingly ordinary day, you discover a mysterious space shuttle with an unusual robot on board. You will have to:

- escape the city,

- uncover the robot’s secret and its origin,

- find out why it is being hunted.

Gameplay:

Interact with characters and the environment, solve puzzles, and complete mini-games.

Visual Style:

Stylized hand-painted visuals convey a retrofuturistic atmosphere.

Music:

An ambient soundtrack with cyberpunk elements enhances the mood.
